ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., transformer, LSTM) */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., layers, units) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the model */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility of the model (public or private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment using the hyperparameters */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for the experiment */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for the experiment */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for the experiment */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in the experiment */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pruning_methods" (
  "pruning_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pruning method */,
  "pruning_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the pruning method (e.g., magnitude pruning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pruning method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pruning_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pruning_schedules" (
  "pruning_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pruning schedule */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment using the pruning schedule */,
  "pruning_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pruning method used in the schedule */,
  "begin_pruning_step" INTEGER /* Step at which pruning begins */,
  "end_pruning_step" INTEGER /* Step at which pruning ends */,
  "pruning_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of pruning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pruning_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pruning_schedules_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pruning_schedules_pruning_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("pruning_method_id") REFERENCES pruning_methods ("pruning_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regularizations" (
  "regularization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regularization technique */,
  "regularization_name" TEXT /* Name of the regularization technique (e.g., dropout, label smoothing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regularization technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regularization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being measured */,
  "BLEU_score" REAL /* BLEU score for the experiment */,
  "sparsity" REAL /* Sparsity of the model */,
  "threshold_decay" REAL /* Threshold decay for the experiment */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being versioned */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the model or experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_experiments" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_hyperparameters" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pruning_method_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "pruning_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pruning method */,
  "pruning_step" INTEGER /* Step at which pruning was applied */,
  "pruned_weights" REAL /* Number of weights pruned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pruning_method_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pruning_method_logs_pruning_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("pruning_method_id") REFERENCES pruning_methods ("pruning_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regularization_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "regularization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regularization technique */,
  "regularization_step" INTEGER /* Step at which regularization was applied */,
  "regularized_weights" REAL /* Number of weights regularized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regularization_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regularization_logs_regularization_id FOREIGN KEY ("regularization_id") REFERENCES regularizations ("regularization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being versioned */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
